scripts.author: cd services/author && npm run dev
scripts.build:author: cd services/author && npm run build
scripts.start-all: concurrently "npm run frontend" "npm run author" "npm run blog" "npm run social" "npm run user"
scripts.build-all: concurrently "npm run build:frontend" "npm run build:author" "npm run build:blog" "npm run build:social" "npm run build:user"
